SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.esql

Class NHostVariable

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.esql.NHostVariable
public class NHostVariable extends Object
This class represents a host variable in SQL. It provides methods to handle and manipulate the host variable.

  • Method Details

    • hasIndicator

      public boolean hasIndicator()
      Checks if the host variable has an indicator.
      Returns:
      true if the host variable has an indicator, false otherwise.

      Checks if the host variable is null.
